title: EnderchestExpand
description: This plugin makes the enderchest as big as a double chest
body:
This plugin enhances and optimizes the default Minecraft Ender Chest by significantly expanding its storage capacity and improving usability. Instead of the standard limited inventory, the Ender Chest is upgraded to the size of a double chest, providing players with 54 slots of secure, personal storage.

The expanded Ender Chest remains player-specific, meaning each player still has their own private inventory that is accessible from any Ender Chest in the world. The plugin is designed to integrate seamlessly into the game without altering core mechanics or breaking existing Ender Chest data.

In addition to the increased size, the plugin optimizes inventory handling to ensure smooth performance, even on servers with many players accessing their Ender Chests simultaneously. It is lightweight, efficient, and fully compatible with survival gameplay.
